title: Better Sodium Video Settings Button
description: Moves the sodium video settings button
body:
![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Better_Sodium/BH_BS_Header.png) ![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Better_Sodium/BH_BS_Overview.png)This mod changes the [Sodium](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sodium/) video settings menu to the original and adds a button to get to the [Sodium](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sodium/) one in case of special options.

## Showcase [![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Better_Sodium/BH_BS_PromoCard.png)](https://bisecthosting.com/lime)
